members.name: _Backspace
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user presses the backspace key.

members.name: _Copy
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a copy operation.

members.name: _Cut
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a cut operation.

members.name: _HandleUnicodeInput
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user types in the provided key [param unicode_char].

members.name: _Paste
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a paste operation.

members.name: _PastePrimaryClipboard
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a paste operation with middle mouse button. [b]Note:[/b] This method is only implemented on Linux.

members.name: AddCaret
members.signature: public int AddCaret(int line, int column)
members.summary: Adds a new caret at the given location. Returns the index of the new caret, or [code]-1[/code] if the location is invalid.

members.name: AddCaretAtCarets
members.summary: Adds an additional caret above or below every caret. If [param below] is [code]true[/code] the new caret will be added below and above otherwise.

members.name: AddGutter
members.summary: Register a new gutter to this [TextEdit]. Use [param at] to have a specific gutter order. A value of [code]-1[/code] appends the gutter to the right.

members.name: AddSelectionForNextOccurrence
members.summary: Adds a selection and a caret for the next occurrence of the current selection. If there is no active selection, selects word under caret.

members.name: AdjustCaretsAfterEdit
members.signature: public void AdjustCaretsAfterEdit(int caret, int fromLine, int fromCol, int toLine, int toCol)
members.summary: This method does nothing.

members.name: AdjustViewportToCaret
members.summary: Adjust the viewport so the caret is visible.

members.name: ApplyIme
members.summary: Applies text from the [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Input_method]Input Method Editor[/url] (IME) to each caret and closes the IME if it is open.

members.name: Backspace
members.summary: Called when the user presses the backspace key. Can be overridden with [method _backspace].

members.name: BeginComplexOperation
members.summary: Starts a multipart edit. All edits will be treated as one action until [method end_complex_operation] is called.

members.name: BeginMulticaretEdit
members.summary: Starts an edit for multiple carets. The edit must be ended with [method end_multicaret_edit]. Multicaret edits can be used to edit text at multiple carets and delay merging the carets until the end, so the caret indexes aren't affected immediately. [method begin_multicaret_edit] and [method end_multicaret_edit] can be nested, and the merge will happen at the last [method end_multicaret_edit]. [codeblock] begin_complex_operation() begin_multicaret_edit() for i in range(get_caret_count()): if multicaret_edit_ignore_caret(i): continue # Logic here. end_multicaret_edit() end_complex_operation() [/codeblock]

members.name: CancelIme
members.summary: Closes the [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Input_method]Input Method Editor[/url] (IME) if it is open. Any text in the IME will be lost.

members.name: CenterViewportToCaret
members.summary: Centers the viewport on the line the editing caret is at. This also resets the [member scroll_horizontal] value to [code]0[/code].

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Performs a full reset of [TextEdit], including undo history.

members.name: ClearUndoHistory
members.summary: Clears the undo history.

members.name: CollapseCarets
members.signature: public void CollapseCarets(int fromLine, int fromColumn, int toLine, int toColumn, bool inclusive)
members.summary: Collapse all carets in the given range to the [param from_line] and [param from_column] position. [param inclusive] applies to both ends. If [method is_in_mulitcaret_edit] is [code]true[/code], carets that are collapsed will be [code]true[/code] for [method multicaret_edit_ignore_caret]. [method merge_overlapping_carets] will be called if any carets were collapsed.

members.name: Copy
members.summary: Copies the current text selection. Can be overridden with [method _copy].

members.name: Cut
members.summary: Cut's the current selection. Can be overridden with [method _cut].

members.name: DeleteSelection
members.summary: Deletes the selected text.

members.name: Deselect
members.summary: Deselects the current selection.

members.name: EndAction
members.summary: Marks the end of steps in the current action started with [method start_action].

members.name: EndComplexOperation
members.summary: Ends a multipart edit, started with [method begin_complex_operation]. If called outside a complex operation, the current operation is pushed onto the undo/redo stack.

members.name: EndMulticaretEdit
members.summary: Ends an edit for multiple carets, that was started with [method begin_multicaret_edit]. If this was the last [method end_multicaret_edit] and [method merge_overlapping_carets] was called, carets will be merged.

members.name: GetCaretColumn
members.summary: Returns the column the editing caret is at.

members.name: GetCaretCount
members.summary: Returns the number of carets in this [TextEdit].

members.name: GetCaretDrawPos
members.summary: Returns the caret pixel draw position.

members.name: GetCaretIndexEditOrder
members.summary: Returns a list of caret indexes in their edit order, this done from bottom to top. Edit order refers to the way actions such as [method insert_text_at_caret] are applied.

members.name: GetCaretLine
members.summary: Returns the line the editing caret is on.

members.name: GetCaretWrapIndex
members.summary: Returns the wrap index the editing caret is on.

members.name: GetFirstNonWhitespaceColumn
members.summary: Returns the first column containing a non-whitespace character on the given line. If there is only whitespace, returns the number of characters.

members.name: GetFirstVisibleLine
members.summary: Returns the first visible line.

members.name: GetGutterCount
members.summary: Returns the number of gutters registered.

members.name: GetGutterName
members.summary: Returns the name of the gutter at the given index.

members.name: GetGutterType
members.summary: Returns the type of the gutter at the given index. Gutters can contain icons, text, or custom visuals.

members.name: GetGutterWidth
members.summary: Returns the width of the gutter at the given index.

members.name: GetHScrollBar
members.summary: Returns the [HScrollBar] used by [TextEdit].

members.name: GetIndentLevel
members.summary: Returns the indent level of the given line. This is the number of spaces and tabs at the beginning of the line, with the tabs taking the tab size into account (see [method get_tab_size]).

members.name: GetLastFullVisibleLine
members.summary: Returns the last visible line. Use [method get_last_full_visible_line_wrap_index] for the wrap index.

members.name: GetLastFullVisibleLineWrapIndex
members.summary: Returns the last visible wrap index of the last visible line.

members.name: GetLastUnhiddenLine
members.summary: Returns the last unhidden line in the entire [TextEdit].

members.name: GetLine
members.summary: Returns the text of a specific line.

members.name: GetLineBackgroundColor
members.summary: Returns the custom background color of the given line. If no color is set, returns [code]Color(0, 0, 0, 0)[/code].

members.name: GetLineColumnAtPos
members.signature: public Vector2i GetLineColumnAtPos(Vector2i position, bool clampLine, bool clampColumn)
members.summary: Returns the line and column at the given position. In the returned vector, [code]x[/code] is the column and [code]y[/code] is the line. If [param clamp_line] is [code]false[/code] and [param position] is below the last line, [code]Vector2i(-1, -1)[/code] is returned. If [param clamp_column] is [code]false[/code] and [param position] is outside the column range of the line, [code]Vector2i(-1, -1)[/code] is returned.

members.name: GetLineCount
members.summary: Returns the number of lines in the text.

members.name: GetLineGutterIcon
members.signature: public Texture2D GetLineGutterIcon(int line, int gutter)
members.summary: Returns the icon currently in [param gutter] at [param line]. This only works when the gutter type is [constant GUTTER_TYPE_ICON] (see [method set_gutter_type]).

members.name: GetLineGutterItemColor
members.signature: public Color GetLineGutterItemColor(int line, int gutter)
members.summary: Returns the color currently in [param gutter] at [param line].

members.name: GetLineGutterMetadata
members.signature: public Variant GetLineGutterMetadata(int line, int gutter)
members.summary: Returns the metadata currently in [param gutter] at [param line].

members.name: GetLineGutterText
members.signature: public String GetLineGutterText(int line, int gutter)
members.summary: Returns the text currently in [param gutter] at [param line]. This only works when the gutter type is [constant GUTTER_TYPE_STRING] (see [method set_gutter_type]).

members.name: GetLineHeight
members.summary: Returns the maximum value of the line height among all lines. [b]Note:[/b] The return value is influenced by [theme_item line_spacing] and [theme_item font_size]. And it will not be less than [code]1[/code].

members.name: GetLineRangesFromCarets
members.signature: public Vector2i[] GetLineRangesFromCarets(bool onlySelections, bool mergeAdjacent)
members.summary: Returns an [Array] of line ranges where [code]x[/code] is the first line and [code]y[/code] is the last line. All lines within these ranges will have a caret on them or be part of a selection. Each line will only be part of one line range, even if it has multiple carets on it. If a selection's end column ([method get_selection_to_column]) is at column [code]0[/code], that line will not be included. If a selection begins on the line after another selection ends and [param merge_adjacent] is [code]true[/code], or they begin and end on the same line, one line range will include both selections.

members.name: GetLineWidth
members.signature: public int GetLineWidth(int line, int wrapIndex)
members.summary: Returns the width in pixels of the [param wrap_index] on [param line].

members.name: GetLineWithIme
members.summary: Returns line text as it is currently displayed, including IME composition string.

members.name: GetLineWrapCount
members.summary: Returns the number of times the given line is wrapped.

members.name: GetLineWrapIndexAtColumn
members.signature: public int GetLineWrapIndexAtColumn(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the wrap index of the given column on the given line. This ranges from [code]0[/code] to [method get_line_wrap_count].

members.name: GetLineWrappedText
members.summary: Returns an array of [String]s representing each wrapped index.

members.name: GetLocalMousePos
members.summary: Returns the local mouse position adjusted for the text direction.

members.name: GetMenu
members.summary: Returns the [PopupMenu] of this [TextEdit]. By default, this menu is displayed when right-clicking on the [TextEdit]. You can add custom menu items or remove standard ones. Make sure your IDs don't conflict with the standard ones (see [enum MenuItems]). For example: [codeblocks] [gdscript] func _ready(): var menu = get_menu() # Remove all items after "Redo". menu.item_count = menu.get_item_index(MENU_REDO) + 1 # Add custom items. menu.add_separator() menu.add_item("Insert Date", MENU_MAX + 1) # Connect callback. menu.id_pressed.connect(_on_item_pressed) func _on_item_pressed(id): if id == MENU_MAX + 1: insert_text_at_caret(Time.get_date_string_from_system()) [/gdscript] [csharp] public override void _Ready() { var menu = GetMenu(); // Remove all items after "Redo". menu.ItemCount = menu.GetItemIndex(TextEdit.MenuItems.Redo) + 1; // Add custom items. menu.AddSeparator(); menu.AddItem("Insert Date", TextEdit.MenuItems.Max + 1); // Add event handler. menu.IdPressed += OnItemPressed; } public void OnItemPressed(int id) { if (id == TextEdit.MenuItems.Max + 1) { InsertTextAtCaret(Time.GetDateStringFromSystem()); } } [/csharp] [/codeblocks] [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member Window.visible] property.

members.name: GetMinimapLineAtPos
members.summary: Returns the equivalent minimap line at [param position].

members.name: GetMinimapVisibleLines
members.summary: Returns the number of lines that may be drawn on the minimap.

members.name: GetNextCompositeCharacterColumn
members.signature: public int GetNextCompositeCharacterColumn(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the correct column at the end of a composite character like ❤️‍🩹 (mending heart; Unicode: [code]U+2764 U+FE0F U+200D U+1FA79[/code]) which is comprised of more than one Unicode code point, if the caret is at the start of the composite character. Also returns the correct column with the caret at mid grapheme and for non-composite characters. [b]Note:[/b] To check at caret location use [code]get_next_composite_character_column(get_caret_line(), get_caret_column())[/code]

members.name: GetNextVisibleLineIndexOffsetFrom
members.signature: public Vector2i GetNextVisibleLineIndexOffsetFrom(int line, int wrapIndex, int visibleAmount)
members.summary: Similar to [method get_next_visible_line_offset_from], but takes into account the line wrap indexes. In the returned vector, [code]x[/code] is the line, [code]y[/code] is the wrap index.

members.name: GetNextVisibleLineOffsetFrom
members.signature: public int GetNextVisibleLineOffsetFrom(int line, int visibleAmount)
members.summary: Returns the count to the next visible line from [param line] to [code]line + visible_amount[/code]. Can also count backwards. For example if a [TextEdit] has 5 lines with lines 2 and 3 hidden, calling this with [code]line = 1, visible_amount = 1[/code] would return 3.

members.name: GetPosAtLineColumn
members.signature: public Vector2i GetPosAtLineColumn(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the local position for the given [param line] and [param column]. If [code]x[/code] or [code]y[/code] of the returned vector equal [code]-1[/code], the position is outside of the viewable area of the control. [b]Note:[/b] The Y position corresponds to the bottom side of the line. Use [method get_rect_at_line_column] to get the top side position.

members.name: GetPreviousCompositeCharacterColumn
members.signature: public int GetPreviousCompositeCharacterColumn(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the correct column at the start of a composite character like ❤️‍🩹 (mending heart; Unicode: [code]U+2764 U+FE0F U+200D U+1FA79[/code]) which is comprised of more than one Unicode code point, if the caret is at the end of the composite character. Also returns the correct column with the caret at mid grapheme and for non-composite characters. [b]Note:[/b] To check at caret location use [code]get_previous_composite_character_column(get_caret_line(), get_caret_column())[/code]

members.name: GetRectAtLineColumn
members.signature: public Rect2i GetRectAtLineColumn(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the local position and size for the grapheme at the given [param line] and [param column]. If [code]x[/code] or [code]y[/code] position of the returned rect equal [code]-1[/code], the position is outside of the viewable area of the control. [b]Note:[/b] The Y position of the returned rect corresponds to the top side of the line, unlike [method get_pos_at_line_column] which returns the bottom side.

members.name: GetSavedVersion
members.summary: Returns the last tagged saved version from [method tag_saved_version].

members.name: GetScrollPosForLine
members.signature: public float GetScrollPosForLine(int line, int wrapIndex)
members.summary: Returns the scroll position for [param wrap_index] of [param line].

members.name: GetSelectedText
members.summary: Returns the text inside the selection of a caret, or all the carets if [param caret_index] is its default value [code]-1[/code].

members.name: GetSelectionAtLineColumn
members.signature: public int GetSelectionAtLineColumn(int line, int column, bool includeEdges, bool onlySelections)
members.summary: Returns the caret index of the selection at the given [param line] and [param column], or [code]-1[/code] if there is none. If [param include_edges] is [code]false[/code], the position must be inside the selection and not at either end. If [param only_selections] is [code]false[/code], carets without a selection will also be considered.

members.name: GetSelectionColumn
members.summary: Returns the original start column of the selection.

members.name: GetSelectionFromColumn
members.summary: Returns the selection begin column. Returns the caret column if there is no selection.

members.name: GetSelectionFromLine
members.summary: Returns the selection begin line. Returns the caret line if there is no selection.

members.name: GetSelectionLine
members.summary: Returns the original start line of the selection.

members.name: GetSelectionMode
members.summary: Returns the current selection mode.

members.name: GetSelectionOriginColumn
members.summary: Returns the origin column of the selection. This is the opposite end from the caret.

members.name: GetSelectionOriginLine
members.summary: Returns the origin line of the selection. This is the opposite end from the caret.

members.name: GetSelectionToColumn
members.summary: Returns the selection end column. Returns the caret column if there is no selection.

members.name: GetSelectionToLine
members.summary: Returns the selection end line. Returns the caret line if there is no selection.

members.name: GetSortedCarets
members.summary: Returns the carets sorted by selection beginning from lowest line and column to highest (from top to bottom of text). If [param include_ignored_carets] is [code]false[/code], carets from [method multicaret_edit_ignore_caret] will be ignored.

members.name: GetTabSize
members.summary: Returns the [TextEdit]'s' tab size.

members.name: GetTotalGutterWidth
members.summary: Returns the total width of all gutters and internal padding.

members.name: GetTotalVisibleLineCount
members.summary: Returns the total number of lines in the text. This includes wrapped lines and excludes folded lines. If [member wrap_mode] is set to [constant LINE_WRAPPING_NONE] and no lines are folded (see [method CodeEdit.is_line_folded]) then this is equivalent to [method get_line_count]. See [method get_visible_line_count_in_range] for a limited range of lines.

members.name: GetVScrollBar
members.summary: Returns the [VScrollBar] of the [TextEdit].

members.name: GetVersion
members.summary: Returns the current version of the [TextEdit]. The version is a count of recorded operations by the undo/redo history.

members.name: GetVisibleLineCount
members.summary: Returns the number of lines that can visually fit, rounded down, based on this control's height.

members.name: GetVisibleLineCountInRange
members.signature: public int GetVisibleLineCountInRange(int fromLine, int toLine)
members.summary: Returns the total number of lines between [param from_line] and [param to_line] (inclusive) in the text. This includes wrapped lines and excludes folded lines. If the range covers all lines it is equivalent to [method get_total_visible_line_count].

members.name: GetWordAtPos
members.summary: Returns the word at [param position].

members.name: GetWordUnderCaret
members.summary: Returns a [String] text with the word under the caret's location.

members.name: HasImeText
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user has text in the [url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Input_method]Input Method Editor[/url] (IME).

members.name: HasRedo
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a "redo" action is available.

members.name: HasSelection
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user has selected text.

members.name: HasUndo
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if an "undo" action is available.

members.name: InsertLineAt
members.signature: public void InsertLineAt(int line, String text)
members.summary: Inserts a new line with [param text] at [param line].

members.name: InsertText
members.signature: public void InsertText(String text, int line, int column, bool beforeSelectionBegin, bool beforeSelectionEnd)
members.summary: Inserts the [param text] at [param line] and [param column]. If [param before_selection_begin] is [code]true[/code], carets and selections that begin at [param line] and [param column] will moved to the end of the inserted text, along with all carets after it. If [param before_selection_end] is [code]true[/code], selections that end at [param line] and [param column] will be extended to the end of the inserted text. These parameters can be used to insert text inside of or outside of selections.

members.name: InsertTextAtCaret
members.signature: public void InsertTextAtCaret(String text, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Insert the specified text at the caret position.

members.name: IsCaretAfterSelectionOrigin
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the caret of the selection is after the selection origin. This can be used to determine the direction of the selection.

members.name: IsCaretVisible
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the caret is visible, [code]false[/code] otherwise. A caret will be considered hidden if it is outside the scrollable area when scrolling is enabled. [b]Note:[/b] [method is_caret_visible] does not account for a caret being off-screen if it is still within the scrollable area. It will return [code]true[/code] even if the caret is off-screen as long as it meets [TextEdit]'s own conditions for being visible. This includes uses of [member scroll_fit_content_width] and [member scroll_fit_content_height] that cause the [TextEdit] to expand beyond the viewport's bounds. [b]Note:[/b] This method does [i]not[/i] guarantee an accurate visibility check immediately after setting the caret position. The correct value may only be available in the next frame after the [TextEdit] has finished drawing. This also applies to any operation that causes the [TextEdit] to change in size.

members.name: IsDraggingCursor
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is dragging their mouse for scrolling, selecting, or text dragging.

members.name: IsGutterClickable
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the gutter at the given index is clickable. See [method set_gutter_clickable].

members.name: IsGutterDrawn
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the gutter at the given index is currently drawn. See [method set_gutter_draw].

members.name: IsGutterOverwritable
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the gutter at the given index is overwritable. See [method set_gutter_overwritable].

members.name: IsInMulitcaretEdit
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a [method begin_multicaret_edit] has been called and [method end_multicaret_edit] has not yet been called.

members.name: IsLineGutterClickable
members.signature: public bool IsLineGutterClickable(int line, int gutter)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the gutter at the given index on the given line is clickable. See [method set_line_gutter_clickable].

members.name: IsLineInViewport
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is within the scope of the scrollable area of the viewport.

members.name: IsLineWrapped
members.summary: Returns if the given line is wrapped.

members.name: IsMenuVisible
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the menu is visible. Use this instead of [code]get_menu().visible[/code] to improve performance (so the creation of the menu is avoided). See [method get_menu].

members.name: IsMouseOverSelection
members.signature: public bool IsMouseOverSelection(bool edges, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the mouse is over a selection. If [param edges] is [code]true[/code], the edges are considered part of the selection.

members.name: IsOvertypeModeEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if overtype mode is enabled. See [method set_overtype_mode_enabled].

members.name: MenuOption
members.summary: Executes a given action as defined in the [enum MenuItems] enum.

members.name: MergeGutters
members.signature: public void MergeGutters(int fromLine, int toLine)
members.summary: Merge the gutters from [param from_line] into [param to_line]. Only overwritable gutters will be copied. See [method set_gutter_overwritable].

members.name: MergeOverlappingCarets
members.summary: Merges any overlapping carets. Will favor the newest caret, or the caret with a selection. If [method is_in_mulitcaret_edit] is [code]true[/code], the merge will be queued to happen at the end of the multicaret edit. See [method begin_multicaret_edit] and [method end_multicaret_edit]. [b]Note:[/b] This is not called when a caret changes position but after certain actions, so it is possible to get into a state where carets overlap.

members.name: MulticaretEditIgnoreCaret
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param caret_index] should be ignored as part of a multicaret edit. See [method begin_multicaret_edit] and [method end_multicaret_edit]. Carets that should be ignored are ones that were part of removed text and will likely be merged at the end of the edit, or carets that were added during the edit. It is recommended to [code]continue[/code] within a loop iterating on multiple carets if a caret should be ignored.

members.name: Paste
members.summary: Paste at the current location. Can be overridden with [method _paste].

members.name: PastePrimaryClipboard
members.summary: Pastes the primary clipboard.

members.name: Redo
members.summary: Perform redo operation.

members.name: RemoveCaret
members.summary: Removes the given caret index. [b]Note:[/b] This can result in adjustment of all other caret indices.

members.name: RemoveGutter
members.summary: Removes the gutter at the given index.

members.name: RemoveLineAt
members.signature: public void RemoveLineAt(int line, bool moveCaretsDown)
members.summary: Removes the line of text at [param line]. Carets on this line will attempt to match their previous visual x position. If [param move_carets_down] is [code]true[/code] carets will move to the next line down, otherwise carets will move up.

members.name: RemoveSecondaryCarets
members.summary: Removes all additional carets.

members.name: RemoveText
members.signature: public void RemoveText(int fromLine, int fromColumn, int toLine, int toColumn)
members.summary: Removes text between the given positions.

members.name: Search
members.signature: public Vector2i Search(String text, int flags, int fromLine, int fromColumn)
members.summary: Perform a search inside the text. Search flags can be specified in the [enum SearchFlags] enum. In the returned vector, [code]x[/code] is the column, [code]y[/code] is the line. If no results are found, both are equal to [code]-1[/code]. [codeblocks] [gdscript] var result = search("print", SEARCH_WHOLE_WORDS, 0, 0) if result.x != -1: # Result found. var line_number = result.y var column_number = result.x [/gdscript] [csharp] Vector2I result = Search("print", (uint)TextEdit.SearchFlags.WholeWords, 0, 0); if (result.X != -1) { // Result found. int lineNumber = result.Y; int columnNumber = result.X; } [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

members.name: Select
members.signature: public void Select(int originLine, int originColumn, int caretLine, int caretColumn, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Selects text from [param origin_line] and [param origin_column] to [param caret_line] and [param caret_column] for the given [param caret_index]. This moves the selection origin and the caret. If the positions are the same, the selection will be deselected. If [member selecting_enabled] is [code]false[/code], no selection will occur. [b]Note:[/b] If supporting multiple carets this will not check for any overlap. See [method merge_overlapping_carets].

members.name: SelectAll
members.summary: Select all the text. If [member selecting_enabled] is [code]false[/code], no selection will occur.

members.name: SelectWordUnderCaret
members.summary: Selects the word under the caret.

members.name: SetCaretColumn
members.signature: public void SetCaretColumn(int column, bool adjustViewport, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Moves the caret to the specified [param column] index. If [param adjust_viewport] is [code]true[/code], the viewport will center at the caret position after the move occurs. [b]Note:[/b] If supporting multiple carets this will not check for any overlap. See [method merge_overlapping_carets].

members.name: SetCaretLine
members.signature: public void SetCaretLine(int line, bool adjustViewport, bool canBeHidden, int wrapIndex, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Moves the caret to the specified [param line] index. The caret column will be moved to the same visual position it was at the last time [method set_caret_column] was called, or clamped to the end of the line. If [param adjust_viewport] is [code]true[/code], the viewport will center at the caret position after the move occurs. If [param can_be_hidden] is [code]true[/code], the specified [param line] can be hidden. If [param wrap_index] is [code]-1[/code], the caret column will be clamped to the [param line]'s length. If [param wrap_index] is greater than [code]-1[/code], the column will be moved to attempt to match the visual x position on the line's [param wrap_index] to the position from the last time [method set_caret_column] was called. [b]Note:[/b] If supporting multiple carets this will not check for any overlap. See [method merge_overlapping_carets].

members.name: SetGutterClickable
members.signature: public void SetGutterClickable(int gutter, bool clickable)
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the mouse cursor will change to a pointing hand ([constant Control.CURSOR_POINTING_HAND]) when hovering over the gutter at the given index. See [method is_gutter_clickable] and [method set_line_gutter_clickable].

members.name: SetGutterCustomDraw
members.signature: public void SetGutterCustomDraw(int column, Callable drawCallback)
members.summary: Set a custom draw callback for the gutter at the given index. [param draw_callback] must take the following arguments: A line index [int], a gutter index [int], and an area [Rect2]. This callback only works when the gutter type is [constant GUTTER_TYPE_CUSTOM] (see [method set_gutter_type]).

members.name: SetGutterDraw
members.signature: public void SetGutterDraw(int gutter, bool draw)
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the gutter at the given index is drawn. The gutter type ([method set_gutter_type]) determines how it is drawn. See [method is_gutter_drawn].

members.name: SetGutterName
members.signature: public void SetGutterName(int gutter, String name)
members.summary: Sets the name of the gutter at the given index.

members.name: SetGutterOverwritable
members.signature: public void SetGutterOverwritable(int gutter, bool overwritable)
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the line data of the gutter at the given index can be overridden when using [method merge_gutters]. See [method is_gutter_overwritable].

members.name: SetGutterType
members.signature: public void SetGutterType(int gutter, int type)
members.summary: Sets the type of gutter at the given index. Gutters can contain icons, text, or custom visuals.

members.name: SetGutterWidth
members.signature: public void SetGutterWidth(int gutter, int width)
members.summary: Set the width of the gutter at the given index.

members.name: SetLine
members.signature: public void SetLine(int line, String newText)
members.summary: Sets the text for a specific [param line]. Carets on the line will attempt to keep their visual x position.

members.name: SetLineAsCenterVisible
members.signature: public void SetLineAsCenterVisible(int line, int wrapIndex)
members.summary: Positions the [param wrap_index] of [param line] at the center of the viewport.

members.name: SetLineAsFirstVisible
members.signature: public void SetLineAsFirstVisible(int line, int wrapIndex)
members.summary: Positions the [param wrap_index] of [param line] at the top of the viewport.

members.name: SetLineAsLastVisible
members.signature: public void SetLineAsLastVisible(int line, int wrapIndex)
members.summary: Positions the [param wrap_index] of [param line] at the bottom of the viewport.

members.name: SetLineBackgroundColor
members.signature: public void SetLineBackgroundColor(int line, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the custom background color of the given line. If transparent, this color is applied on top of the default background color (See [theme_item background_color]). If set to [code]Color(0, 0, 0, 0)[/code], no additional color is applied.

members.name: SetLineGutterClickable
members.signature: public void SetLineGutterClickable(int line, int gutter, bool clickable)
members.summary: If [param clickable] is [code]true[/code], makes the [param gutter] on the given [param line] clickable. This is like [method set_gutter_clickable], but for a single line. If [method is_gutter_clickable] is [code]true[/code], this will not have any effect. See [method is_line_gutter_clickable] and [signal gutter_clicked].

members.name: SetLineGutterIcon
members.signature: public void SetLineGutterIcon(int line, int gutter, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Sets the icon for [param gutter] on [param line] to [param icon]. This only works when the gutter type is [constant GUTTER_TYPE_ICON] (see [method set_gutter_type]).

members.name: SetLineGutterItemColor
members.signature: public void SetLineGutterItemColor(int line, int gutter, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the color for [param gutter] on [param line] to [param color].

members.name: SetLineGutterMetadata
members.signature: public void SetLineGutterMetadata(int line, int gutter, Variant metadata)
members.summary: Sets the metadata for [param gutter] on [param line] to [param metadata].

members.name: SetLineGutterText
members.signature: public void SetLineGutterText(int line, int gutter, String text)
members.summary: Sets the text for [param gutter] on [param line] to [param text]. This only works when the gutter type is [constant GUTTER_TYPE_STRING] (see [method set_gutter_type]).

members.name: SetOvertypeModeEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables overtype mode. In this mode, typing overrides existing text instead of inserting text. The [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_toggle_insert_mode] action toggles overtype mode. See [method is_overtype_mode_enabled].

members.name: SetSearchFlags
members.summary: Sets the search [param flags]. This is used with [method set_search_text] to highlight occurrences of the searched text. Search flags can be specified from the [enum SearchFlags] enum.

members.name: SetSearchText
members.summary: Sets the search text. See [method set_search_flags].

members.name: SetSelectionMode
members.summary: Sets the current selection mode.

members.name: SetSelectionOriginColumn
members.signature: public void SetSelectionOriginColumn(int column, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Sets the selection origin column to the [param column] for the given [param caret_index]. If the selection origin is moved to the caret position, the selection will deselect.

members.name: SetSelectionOriginLine
members.signature: public void SetSelectionOriginLine(int line, bool canBeHidden, int wrapIndex, int caretIndex)
members.summary: Sets the selection origin line to the [param line] for the given [param caret_index]. If the selection origin is moved to the caret position, the selection will deselect. If [param can_be_hidden] is [code]false[/code], The line will be set to the nearest unhidden line below or above. If [param wrap_index] is [code]-1[/code], the selection origin column will be clamped to the [param line]'s length. If [param wrap_index] is greater than [code]-1[/code], the column will be moved to attempt to match the visual x position on the line's [param wrap_index] to the position from the last time [method set_selection_origin_column] or [method select] was called.

members.name: SetTabSize
members.summary: Sets the tab size for the [TextEdit] to use.

members.name: SetTooltipRequestFunc
members.summary: Provide custom tooltip text. The callback method must take the following args: [code]hovered_word: String[/code].

members.name: SkipSelectionForNextOccurrence
members.summary: Moves a selection and a caret for the next occurrence of the current selection. If there is no active selection, moves to the next occurrence of the word under caret.

members.name: StartAction
members.summary: Starts an action, will end the current action if [param action] is different. An action will also end after a call to [method end_action], after [member ProjectSettings.gui/timers/text_edit_idle_detect_sec] is triggered or a new undoable step outside the [method start_action] and [method end_action] calls.

members.name: SwapLines
members.signature: public void SwapLines(int fromLine, int toLine)
members.summary: Swaps the two lines. Carets will be swapped with the lines.

members.name: TagSavedVersion
members.summary: Tag the current version as saved.

members.name: Undo
members.summary: Perform undo operation.

members.name: AutowrapMode
members.summary: If [member wrap_mode] is set to [constant LINE_WRAPPING_BOUNDARY], sets text wrapping mode.

members.name: BackspaceDeletesCompositeCharacterEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code] and [member caret_mid_grapheme] is [code]false[/code], backspace deletes an entire composite character such as ❤️‍🩹, instead of deleting part of the composite character.

members.name: CaretBlink
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], makes the caret blink.

members.name: CaretBlinkInterval
members.summary: The interval at which the caret blinks (in seconds).

members.name: CaretDrawWhenEditableDisabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], caret will be visible when [member editable] is disabled.

members.name: CaretMidGrapheme
members.summary: Allow moving caret, selecting and removing the individual composite character components. [b]Note:[/b] [kbd]Backspace[/kbd] is always removing individual composite character components.

members.name: CaretMoveOnRightClick
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], a right-click moves the caret at the mouse position before displaying the context menu. If [code]false[/code], the context menu ignores mouse location.

members.name: CaretMultiple
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], multiple carets are allowed. Left-clicking with [kbd]Alt[/kbd] adds a new caret. See [method add_caret] and [method get_caret_count].

members.name: CaretType
members.summary: Set the type of caret to draw.

members.name: ContextMenuEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], a right-click displays the context menu.

members.name: CustomWordSeparators
members.summary: The characters to consider as word delimiters if [member use_custom_word_separators] is [code]true[/code]. The characters should be defined without separation, for example [code]#_![/code].

members.name: DeselectOnFocusLossEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the selected text will be deselected when focus is lost.

members.name: DragAndDropSelectionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], allow drag and drop of selected text. Text can still be dropped from other sources.

members.name: DrawControlChars
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], control characters are displayed.

members.name: DrawSpaces
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the "space" character will have a visible representation.

members.name: DrawTabs
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the "tab" character will have a visible representation.

members.name: Editable
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], existing text cannot be modified and new text cannot be added.

members.name: EmojiMenuEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], "Emoji and Symbols" menu is enabled.

members.name: EmptySelectionClipboardEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], copying or cutting without a selection is performed on all lines with a caret. Otherwise, copy and cut require a selection.

members.name: HighlightAllOccurrences
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], all occurrences of the selected text will be highlighted.

members.name: HighlightCurrentLine
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the line containing the cursor is highlighted.

members.name: IndentWrappedLines
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], all wrapped lines are indented to the same amount as the unwrapped line.

members.name: Language
members.summary: Language code used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If left empty, the current locale is used instead.

members.name: MiddleMousePasteEnabled
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], using middle mouse button to paste clipboard will be disabled. [b]Note:[/b] This method is only implemented on Linux.

members.name: MinimapDraw
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], a minimap is shown, providing an outline of your source code. The minimap uses a fixed-width text size.

members.name: MinimapWidth
members.summary: The width, in pixels, of the minimap.

members.name: PlaceholderText
members.summary: Text shown when the [TextEdit] is empty. It is [b]not[/b] the [TextEdit]'s default value (see [member text]).

members.name: ScrollFitContentHeight
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], [TextEdit] fits its minimum height to the number of visible lines instead of scrolling vertically. If a maximum height is set (for example via [member Control.custom_maximum_size]) and content exceeds it, a vertical scrollbar is shown.

members.name: ScrollFitContentWidth
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], [TextEdit] fits its minimum width to the widest line instead of scrolling horizontally. If a maximum width is set (for example via [member Control.custom_maximum_size]) and content exceeds it, a horizontal scrollbar is shown.

members.name: ScrollHorizontal
members.summary: If there is a horizontal scrollbar, this determines the current horizontal scroll value in pixels.

members.name: ScrollPastEndOfFile
members.summary: Allow scrolling past the last line into "virtual" space.

members.name: ScrollSmooth
members.summary: Scroll smoothly over the text rather than jumping to the next location.

members.name: ScrollVScrollSpeed
members.summary: Sets the scroll speed with the minimap or when [member scroll_smooth] is enabled.

members.name: ScrollVertical
members.summary: If there is a vertical scrollbar, this determines the current vertical scroll value in line numbers, starting at 0 for the top line.

members.name: SelectingEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], text can be selected. If [code]false[/code], text can not be selected by the user or by the [method select] or [method select_all] methods.

members.name: ShortcutKeysEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shortcut keys for context menu items are enabled, even if the context menu is disabled.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverride
members.summary: Set BiDi algorithm override for the structured text.

members.name: StructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.summary: Set additional options for BiDi override.

members.name: SyntaxHighlighter
members.summary: The syntax highlighter to use. [b]Note:[/b] A [SyntaxHighlighter] instance should not be used across multiple [TextEdit] nodes.

members.name: TabInputMode
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_indent] input [code]Tab[/code] character, otherwise it moves keyboard focus to the next [Control] in the scene.

members.name: Text
members.summary: String value of the [TextEdit].

members.name: TextDirection
members.summary: Base text writing direction.

members.name: UseCustomWordSeparators
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], using [kbd]Ctrl + Left[/kbd] or [kbd]Ctrl + Right[/kbd] ([kbd]Cmd + Left[/kbd] or [kbd]Cmd + Right[/kbd] on macOS) bindings will use the behavior of [member use_default_word_separators]. If [code]true[/code], it will also stop the caret if a character within [member custom_word_separators] is detected. Useful for subword moving. This behavior also will be applied to the behavior of text selection.

members.name: UseDefaultWordSeparators
members.summary: If [code]false[/code], using [kbd]Ctrl + Left[/kbd] or [kbd]Ctrl + Right[/kbd] ([kbd]Cmd + Left[/kbd] or [kbd]Cmd + Right[/kbd] on macOS) bindings will stop moving caret only if a space or punctuation is detected. If [code]true[/code], it will also stop the caret if a character is part of [code]!"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^`{|}~[/code], the Unicode General Punctuation table, or the Unicode CJK Punctuation table. Useful for subword moving. This behavior also will be applied to the behavior of text selection.

members.name: VirtualKeyboardEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the native virtual keyboard is enabled on platforms that support it.

members.name: VirtualKeyboardShowOnFocus
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the native virtual keyboard is shown on focus events on platforms that support it.

members.name: WrapMode
members.summary: Sets the line wrapping mode to use.

signals.name: CaretChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when any caret changes position.

signals.name: GutterAdded
signals.summary: Emitted when a gutter is added.

signals.name: GutterClicked
signals.summary: Emitted when a gutter is clicked.

signals.name: GutterRemoved
signals.summary: Emitted when a gutter is removed.

signals.name: LinesEditedFrom
signals.summary: Emitted immediately when the text changes. When text is added [param from_line] will be less than [param to_line]. On a remove [param to_line] will be less than [param from_line].

signals.name: TextSet
signals.summary: Emitted when [method clear] is called or [member text] is set.

values.name: GUTTER_TYPE_CUSTOM
values.summary: When a gutter is set to custom using [method set_gutter_type], it is used to contain custom visuals controlled by a callback method set via the [method set_gutter_custom_draw] method.

values.name: GUTTER_TYPE_ICON
values.summary: When a gutter is set to icon using [method set_gutter_type], it is used to contain an icon set via the [method set_line_gutter_icon] method.

values.name: GUTTER_TYPE_STRING
values.summary: When a gutter is set to string using [method set_gutter_type], it is used to contain text set via the [method set_line_gutter_text] method.

values.name: LINE_WRAPPING_BOUNDARY
values.summary: Line wrapping occurs at the control boundary, beyond what would normally be visible.

values.name: MENU_CUT
values.summary: Cuts (copies and clears) the selected text.

values.name: MENU_EMOJI_AND_SYMBOL
values.summary: Opens system emoji and symbol picker.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_LRE
values.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right embedding (LRE) character.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_LRO
values.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right override (LRO) character.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_RLE
values.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left embedding (RLE) character.

values.name: MENU_INSERT_RLO
values.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left override (RLO) character.

values.name: MENU_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum MenuItems] enum.

values.name: MENU_PASTE
values.summary: Pastes the clipboard text over the selected text (or at the cursor's position).

values.name: SELECTION_MODE_LINE
values.summary: Select whole lines as if the user triple clicked.

values.name: SELECTION_MODE_POINTER
values.summary: Select single characters as if the user single clicked.

values.name: SELECTION_MODE_WORD
values.summary: Select whole words as if the user double clicked.

constants.name: MENU_CUT
constants.summary: Cuts (copies and clears) the selected text.

constants.name: MENU_PASTE
constants.summary: Pastes the clipboard text over the selected text (or at the cursor's position).

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_LRE
constants.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right embedding (LRE) character.

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_RLE
constants.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left embedding (RLE) character.

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_LRO
constants.summary: Inserts start of left-to-right override (LRO) character.

constants.name: MENU_INSERT_RLO
constants.summary: Inserts start of right-to-left override (RLO) character.

constants.name: MENU_EMOJI_AND_SYMBOL
constants.summary: Opens system emoji and symbol picker.

constants.name: MENU_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum MenuItems] enum.

constants.name: SELECTION_MODE_POINTER
constants.summary: Select single characters as if the user single clicked.

constants.name: SELECTION_MODE_WORD
constants.summary: Select whole words as if the user double clicked.

constants.name: SELECTION_MODE_LINE
constants.summary: Select whole lines as if the user triple clicked.

constants.name: LINE_WRAPPING_BOUNDARY
constants.summary: Line wrapping occurs at the control boundary, beyond what would normally be visible.

constants.name: GUTTER_TYPE_STRING
constants.summary: When a gutter is set to string using [method set_gutter_type], it is used to contain text set via the [method set_line_gutter_text] method.

constants.name: GUTTER_TYPE_ICON
constants.summary: When a gutter is set to icon using [method set_gutter_type], it is used to contain an icon set via the [method set_line_gutter_icon] method.

constants.name: GUTTER_TYPE_CUSTOM
constants.summary: When a gutter is set to custom using [method set_gutter_type], it is used to contain custom visuals controlled by a callback method set via the [method set_gutter_custom_draw] method.

virtualMethods.name: _Backspace
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user presses the backspace key.

virtualMethods.name: _Copy
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a copy operation.

virtualMethods.name: _Cut
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a cut operation.

virtualMethods.name: _HandleUnicodeInput
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user types in the provided key [param unicode_char].

virtualMethods.name: _Paste
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a paste operation.

virtualMethods.name: _PastePrimaryClipboard
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user performs a paste operation with middle mouse button. [b]Note:[/b] This method is only implemented on Linux.
